title: <li>Have you noticed any strange visitors over the past few weeks worth mentioni
content:
• Have you noticed any strange visitors over the past few weeks worth mentioning? Anyone who seemed to be out of place or otherwise seemed dangerous or disturbing?
  • Have you noticed a yellow corvette visiting the parking lot anytime over the past week?
  • What were your impressions of Sheen as a member of our community?
  • Are there any other thoughts or facts that you would like to reveal to me regarding the incident? Anything you might like to add that I have not explicitly asked in this questionnaire?


    • EL starts a website for SHEEN, an in memorium. Her art begins to become popular on the internet. She finds fame after death.

    Re: El’s silence. i think its important to the integrity of this feminine character for her to appear as though she doesn't have a voice to the older generation, the adults that surround her. This symbolizes how the female is often silenced in the word and in narrative. But she does have a voice, and just because it is not a traditional voice doesnt mean its not there. She often communicates with her followers. The scenes with Sheen can play out like how text messages are displayed in House of Cards. So instead of reading it off of paper, it can be an on screen effect mirroring captioning—so like dialogue.
